description: Tracks which source exam files have been text-analyzed. mtime is unix epoch seconds from filesystem at time of scan.

notes: 11/11 years analyzed (2558-2568). 2558-2561 via native pdftotext extraction; 2562-2568 are scanned image PDFs with no embedded text layer (confirmed via PyMuPDF get_text() returning 0 chars on every page) — these were analyzed by rendering each page to an image with PyMuPDF and reading the pages directly (multimodal vision), since no OCR binary (tesseract/poppler) is installed in this environment. All 7 files use the 'academic-year label, sat Feb/Mar/Jan of BE_year+1' NIETS convention (e.g. the '2562' file's cover page is dated 1 Feb 2563) — filename/manifest year_be is kept as the canonical label for consistency with the original 4 years. knowledge_base.json is regenerated from all 11 analyzed/<year>.json files. Exam length changed from 40 items (2558-2563) to 32 items (2564-2568), and 2567-2568 introduced explicit 'PART 1 / PART 2' labeling plus a shift toward reverse-question dialogue completion and pragmatic-inference items.
